summary: Owns lightweight asset create/revise/version-update/remove flows for sync-managed or repo-owned capability assets.
prompt_contract: Choose the lightest correct path: inventory only, asset-only revision, or escalate into full SDLC when broader code/release changes are truly needed.
Treat sync-managed and release-backed assets as first-class surfaces with explicit manifest/index/version implications.
When revising an existing asset, state exactly which files, manifests, index entries, and release or marketplace implications are touched.
